info.name: 🌍 Tours & Travels API – Production Collection
info.description:
## Tours & Travels App – Full API Collection

### 🚀 Quick Start
1. **Import** this collection + the **environment file** into Postman.
2. Set the environment **active**.
3. Run **Admin Login** → tokens saved automatically.
4. Run **Register User** (uses random email) → tokens saved automatically.
5. Run **Create Tour** → tourId saved. Then **Create Tour Date** → tourDateId saved.
6. Now run booking, payment, review flows.

### 🔐 Auth Flow
- User tokens stored in `accessToken`, `refreshToken`
- Admin tokens stored in `adminAccessToken`, `adminRefreshToken`
- All test scripts auto-save IDs (tourId, bookingId, paymentId, etc.)

### 📁 Folder Structure
**USER:** Auth → Home → Tours → Bookings → Payments → Reviews → Users → Wishlist → Notifications → Blogs → Coupons
**ADMIN:** Auth → Dashboard → Tours → Tour Dates → Bookings → Payments → Reviews → Blogs → Coupons → Users → Notifications → Reports

### 🖼️ Image Hosting (ImgBB)
Image uploads (Tours, Blogs, Payments) are now hosted on **ImgBB**. Ensure `IMGBB_API_KEY` is set in the server's `.env` file.

variable.description: API base URL
User JWT access token (auto-set on login)
User JWT refresh token (auto-set on login)
Admin JWT access token (auto-set on admin login)
Admin JWT refresh token (auto-set on admin login)
Current user ID (auto-set on login)
Admin user ID (auto-set on admin login)
Random email (auto-generated on register)
Tour MongoDB ID (auto-set on create tour)
Tour slug for public API
Tour date MongoDB ID (auto-set on create tour date)
Booking MongoDB ID (auto-set on create booking)
Payment MongoDB ID (auto-set on submit proof)
Review MongoDB ID (auto-set on create review)
Blog MongoDB ID (auto-set on create blog)
Blog slug
Coupon MongoDB ID (auto-set on create coupon)
Saved traveler ID
Notification MongoDB ID
Password reset token (from email)
